subject: Fashion and Fabrics
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Ask learners: “Why do people wear clothes?” Write responses on the board.
topics: Divide learners into small groups. Each group lists reasons why people wear different types
Show pictures of people in various outfits from different cultures and weather conditions.
Ask learners to explain why they are dressed that way.
